# Tests that fail on this fork's main branch due to upstream drift
# (not caused by any change on this fork).  Deselected in tests.yml so the
# Tests workflow can stay green on PRs that don't touch these areas.
#
# Re-evaluate periodically: pull from upstream Hermes-Agent and remove
# entries that now pass on a clean checkout.
#
# Lines starting with "#" and blank lines are ignored.

tests/agent/test_auxiliary_client.py::TestAuxiliaryPoolAwareness::test_try_nous_uses_pool_entry
tests/agent/test_bedrock_1m_context.py::TestBedrockContext1MBeta::test_build_anthropic_kwargs_includes_1m_for_bedrock_fastmode
